items.headline: Claude Code now enforces model allowlists
items.body: versions 2.1.175 and 2.1.176 add `enforceAvailableModels`, a managed setting that locks Claude Code's default model to an explicit allowlist. .176 closes a gap where environment variables could redirect around it. for ADO MCP Server running in CI or shared environments, this is actual model governance rather than convention — you can now guarantee which model processes requests, which matters for cost control and reproducibility.
